function T(T)return y[T-(-1046223+1079805)]end for T,t in ipairs({{-897844-(-897845);-613279-(-614756)},{883586+-883585,356500+-356438};{-404369+404432;-515846-(-517323)}})do while t[98870+-98869]<t[61944-61942]do
